# Sage Nord

> Sage Nord (legal entity: Saga ApS) is a senior iOS and mobile architecture
> studio based in Denmark. It helps sports-tech and Danish product teams turn
> ideas into apps and AI that ship — and hold up.

Mission: To empower people through software.
Defining value: Trust — software reliable enough that people can depend on it.

## About
- Founder: Yeskendir Salgara, former iOS Tech Lead at Trackman.
- You work directly with the senior architect doing the work — no handoffs.
- Based in Denmark; serves the Nordics and Europe.

## Services
- Consult: architecture reviews, technical strategy, unblocking mobile teams.
- Research: prototypes and technical due diligence to de-risk roadmaps.
- Develop: senior iOS/mobile engineering — SwiftUI, performance, on-device AI.
- Integrate: connecting apps to platforms, data, and AI models cleanly.
- Maintain: ongoing stewardship that keeps software trustworthy after launch.

## Focus (0 → 1)
- Apps: native iOS/mobile apps from prototype to App Store.
- AI: practical, private, on-device and product AI woven into the experience.

## Contact
- Email: hello@sagenord.com
- Website: https://sorunokoe.github.io/SageNord/ (moving to https://sagenord.com)
